title: Classic Caesar Salad
steps: Wash and thoroughly dry the romaine lettuce, then chop into bite-sized pieces.
Place the lettuce into a large salad bowl.
Drizzle Caesar dressing over the lettuce and toss well to coat evenly.
Add the grated Parmesan cheese and croutons.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the salad.
Season with black pepper and toss gently once more.
Serve immediately to keep the croutons crisp.
